mapper.sql: id, project_id, order_id, bug_id, title, prompt, prompt_hash, prompt_version, risk_level, status, current_attempt_id, approved_attempt_id, approved_head_sha, approved_diff_sha, version, created_by, create_time, updated_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select t.id, t.project_id as projectId, p.name as projectName, t.order_id as orderId, t.bug_id as bugId, t.title, t.risk_level as riskLevel, t.status, t.current_attempt_id as currentAttemptId, t.version, t.created_by as createdBy, t.create_time as createTime, t.update_time as updateTime, a.worker_id as workerId, a.pr_url as prUrl, a.validation_passed as validationPassed, a.error_message as errorMessage from ai_task t join ai_project p on p.id = t.project_id left join ai_attempt a on a.id = t.current_attempt_id
t.project_id = #{projectId} and t.status = #{status}
and (t.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or cast(t.id as char) = #{keyword})
order by t.id desc

select t.id, t.project_id as projectId, p.name as projectName, p.repo_url as repoUrl, t.order_id as orderId, t.bug_id as bugId, t.title, t.prompt, t.prompt_hash as promptHash, t.prompt_version as promptVersion, t.risk_level as riskLevel, t.status, t.current_attempt_id as currentAttemptId, t.approved_attempt_id as approvedAttemptId, t.approved_head_sha as approvedHeadSha, t.approved_diff_sha as approvedDiffSha, t.version, t.created_by as createdBy, t.create_time as createTime, t.updated_by as updatedBy, t.update_time as updateTime from ai_task t join ai_project p on p.id = t.project_id where t.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into ai_task (project_id, order_id, bug_id, title, prompt, prompt_hash, prompt_version, risk_level, status, version, created_by, create_time, updated_by, update_time) values (#{projectId}, #{orderId}, #{bugId}, #{title}, #{prompt}, #{promptHash}, #{promptVersion}, #{riskLevel}, #{status}, 1, #{createdBy}, #{createTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update ai_task set status = 'queued', current_attempt_id = null, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, update_time = now(), version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and status in ('draft','failed','rejected')
update ai_task set status = 'claimed', updated_by = #{updatedBy}, update_time = now(), version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and status = 'queued' and version = #{version}
update ai_task set current_attempt_id = #{attemptId}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = 'claimed' and current_attempt_id is null
update ai_task set status = 'running', update_time = now() where id = #{id} and current_attempt_id = #{attemptId} and status = 'claimed'
update ai_task set status = 'awaiting_review', update_time = now(), version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and current_attempt_id = #{attemptId} and status in ('claimed','running')
update ai_task set status = 'failed', update_time = now(), version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and current_attempt_id = #{attemptId} and status in ('claimed','running')
update ai_task set status = 'queued', current_attempt_id = null, update_time = now(), version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and current_attempt_id = #{attemptId} and status in ('claimed','running')

update ai_task set status = 'approved', approved_attempt_id = #{attemptId}, approved_head_sha = #{headSha}, approved_diff_sha = #{diffSha}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, update_time = now(), version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and current_attempt_id = #{attemptId} and status = 'awaiting_review'
update ai_task set status = 'rejected', updated_by = #{updatedBy}, update_time = now(), version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and current_attempt_id = #{attemptId} and status = 'awaiting_review'

update ai_task set status = 'cancelled', updated_by = #{updatedBy}, update_time = now(), version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and status in ('draft','queued','claimed','running','awaiting_review','failed','rejected')
mapper.select: select t.id as taskId, t.version as taskVersion, t.title, t.prompt_hash as promptHash, p.id as projectId, p.name as projectName, p.repo_url as repoUrl, p.default_branch as defaultBranch, p.profile_key as profileKey, p.provider, p.model from ai_task t join ai_project p on p.id = t.project_id where t.status = 'queued' and p.enabled = 1 and (select count(*) from ai_attempt aa join ai_task tt on tt.id = aa.task_id where tt.project_id = p.id and aa.status in ('claimed','running')) < p.max_parallel order by case t.risk_level when 'low' then 1 when 'medium' then 2 else 3 end, t.id asc limit #{limit}
